purpose: Public Balance Phase 16 data surface. Generated from Phase 10 operating-envelope receipts and Phase 15 Bayesian-floor claim-lock receipts; do not hand-edit.
claimBoundary: Browser cart-pole operating-envelope study only. Same-information Bayesian-floor claim applies inside hard-gate cells; reported-only observation-degradation cells remain explicit boundary diagnostics.

claimGate.policy: standard cells gate on Bayes-vs-naive sanity and Sundog parity; observation-degradation margin cells gate on Sundog parity while reporting Bayes-vs-naive as a boundary diagnostic; Phase 10 failure-regime observation-degradation cells are reported-only until a separate admission spec promotes them.

claimCards.label: Phase 10 operating envelope
claimCards.scope: Shadow controller versus naive shadow centering across mapped Balance cells.

claimCards.label: Phase 15 Bayesian floor
claimCards.scope: Same-information Bayesian-floor receipt with visible hard-gate, observation-parity, and reported-only admission lanes.
